title: Ultralight
description: 1.21.6-1.21.11 | Only what you need for performance.
body:
![ultralightbanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b3e1be5934d42856e4ce7709253b10c5a8e1847_0.webp)

## Performance Comparison

| Metric            | Vanilla | Ultralight |  Improvement  |
| :---------------- | :-----: | :--------: | :-----------: |
| **Min Frametime** |   6 ms  |    4 ms    | ~1.5× better  |
| **Max Frametime** |  107 ms |    54 ms   | ~1.98× better |
| **Avg FPS**       |   134   |     277    | ~2.07× higher |

*Tested under simulated gameplay at 16 render distance.*

**Ultralight is best used on client.**

**If you're looking to improve your server's performance, try out [Lilypad](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lilypad-server/)!** 

**Want to play Minecraft with a new little spin? Try [Wildflower](https://modrinth.com/modpack/wildflower)!**

## Updating the Modpack & Tags

Before a new Ultralight update gets uploaded, it undergoes simulated gameplay testing to assess performance under normal conditions.
If the update meets our internal performance targets, it will be released with an **“A”** in the version name.
If it fails to meet those targets, it will be released with an **“F”** in the version name.

**Tags**

* **A** — Stable and user-ready; no major issues.
* **B** — Acceptable but below optimal performance targets (FPS and/or frametime slightly off).
* **F** — Performance issues; FPS and/or frametime significantly below target.

## OS Compatibility
| OS               | Compatible |
| ---------------- | :--------: |
| Windows          |      ✅     |
| MacOS (ARM) |      ✅     |

_Tested on Apple M1. Measurements taken on Windows._
